'''Josh Wood''' (born 15 November 1995) is an English professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|hk}} for the [[Barrow Raiders]] in the [[RFL Championship]].

He previously played for the [[Salford Red Devils]] in the [[Super League]], and spent time on loan from [[Salford Red Devils|Salford]] at the [[North Wales Crusaders]] in [[League 1 (rugby league)|League 1]], and [[Halifax R.L.F.C.|Halifax]] and the [[Swinton Lions]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]]. He played as a {{rlp|sh}} and {{rlp|so}} earlier in his career.

==Background==
Wood was born in [[Wigan]], [[Greater Manchester, England]].{{fact|date=February 2020}}

==Career==
===Salford Red Devils===
Wood made his Red Devils début in a Super League match on 22 May 2015 against the [[Warrington Wolves]].<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://www.loverugbyleague.com/stats/players/Josh-Wood/|title = Players}}</ref>

===Barrow Raiders===
On 11 October 2021, it was reported that he had signed for [[Barrow Raiders|Barrow]] in the [[RFL Championship]].<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=11 Oct 2021|accessdate=12 Oct 2021|title=Wakefield hooker Josh Wood makes Championship move|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/wakefield-josh-wood-makes-championship-move-barrow/}}</ref>
